name: Affirmative and Defensive Asylum
description: Assistance with affirmative and defensive asylum cases.
details: We help clients organize their documents, prepare forms, and understand each step of the asylum process.

name: Adjustment of Status
description: Help with adjustment of status applications.
details: We assist clients who may qualify to become lawful permanent residents from inside the United States.

name: Naturalization
details: We help clients prepare their naturalization package and review the general requirements before filing.

name: U Visa and T Visa Assistance
description: Assistance for victims who may qualify for humanitarian visa options.
details: We guide clients through document preparation and general case organization for U Visa and T Visa processes.

name: VAWA Petitions
details: We assist with organizing forms and evidence for clients who may qualify under the Violence Against Women Act.

name: Individual Tax Preparation
description: Preparation of personal federal and state tax returns.
details: We help individuals and families prepare tax returns accurately and on time based on their documents.

name: Business Tax Preparation
description: Preparation of business tax returns for companies and self-employed clients.
details: We assist business owners with tax filing, review of records, and preparation of business returns.

name: IRS Dispute and Resolution Services
description: Support with IRS letters, notices, and disputes.
details: We review IRS notices, prepare responses, and help clients organize documents for tax disputes and corrections.

name: Business Formation
description: Help with new business setup and LLC formation.
details: We assist clients with basic business formation steps, including LLC registration support and EIN guidance.

name: Credit Building and Repair Services
description: Support for personal and business credit improvement.
details: We help clients understand credit reports, dispute inaccurate items, and build stronger credit habits.

name: Health Insurance Enrollment
description: Help with health insurance enrollment options.
details: We guide clients through available health coverage options and help them complete enrollment applications.

name: Life Insurance Planning
description: Guidance for selecting life insurance coverage.
details: We help families understand life insurance options and choose coverage that fits their needs and goals.

name: Auto Insurance Coverage
description: Assistance with auto insurance options and coverage review.
details: We help clients compare coverage options and understand deductibles, limits, and policy benefits.

name: ACA Marketplace Assistance
description: Support with Affordable Care Act Marketplace plans.
details: We help clients review ACA Marketplace options, subsidies, and enrollment deadlines.

name: Supplemental Insurance Plans
description: Information about dental, vision, and other supplemental plans.
details: We help clients review additional insurance options that can strengthen their main coverage.
